title: Program
description: A social-protection program in OpenSPP (e.g. a cash transfer scheme). Backed by the Odoo model `g2p.program`. Returned by `getProgram` / `getPrograms` / `getEnrolledPrograms`.

program_id.description: OpenSPP public identifier for the program, of the form `PROG_<YYYY>_<########>` (e.g. `PROG_2023_00000001`).

target_type.description: Whether the program targets `individual` or `group` registrants.

eligible_beneficiaries_count.description: Computed count of registrants currently eligible for the program.

cycles_count.description: Number of payment / delivery cycles defined on the program.
